title: The Missing Blocks Mod
description: A mod which add missing forms of certain block (polished,tiles,bricks,chiseled,etc) in a vanilla way.
body: A mod that add missing variants/forms of block (polished, tiles, or bricks versions).This mod add a lot of block and I am not going to list them all here but here are some examples: -stone wall, polished calcite, amethyst bricks ( more in the gallery).
